_comment: content-creator-pro calendar — defines what to post and when
_usage: Agent reads this file at the start of each content session to find today's slot

sunday.note: Also repurpose top 3 posts from the week

formats.story_post: Personal story with lesson — Moment of Change framework
formats.thread: Multi-tweet thread — one idea per tweet, hook first
formats.long_comment: Substantive reply that adds value to a Reddit thread
formats.single_tweet: One bold statement — declaration or contrarian hook
formats.deep_article: Long-form newsletter piece — Lead / Turn / Close architecture

hook_types.credibility: Lead with proof you have the right to speak
hook_types.curiosity_gap: Open a gap between what they know and what's coming
hook_types.result: Lead with the outcome, not the journey
hook_types.story: Drop into a specific moment — no setup
hook_types.question: A question they haven't been asked
hook_types.list: Promise a specific number of things
hook_types.declaration: Bold statement of belief or position
